prestazioni: Upgrade to a **Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger** (hybrid billet wheel) for the **SAIC 2.0L MGE T-GDI (engine code: 20L4E)** to achieve 450+ HP with a custom **ECU Master EMU Black** standalone ECU tune, supporting 28 psi of boost on E85 fuel with a **Plex Tuning** flex-fuel sensor kit and **Injector Dynamics ID1700x** fuel injectors

Install a **Titan Motorsport** billet aluminum intercooler core (3.5" thick, 12-row) with **VRSF** silicone charge pipes and **TurboSmart** Kompact 50mm dual-port BOV for the **20L4E** engine, paired with a **PTP** 4-ply stainless steel turbo-back exhaust (3.5" diameter, straight-pipe with **Borla** Atak mufflers) for optimized spool and flow

Full **Ohlins Road & Track DFV** coilover suspension with **Eibach** 10K front/8K rear spring rates, **SuperPro** poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and rear trailing arms), and **AP Racing** 6-piston front/4-piston rear brake calipers with **DBA 5000 Series** two-piece rotors (380mm front, 356mm rear) for track-ready handling
estetica: **Rocket Bunny Cyberster V1 Widebody Kit** (carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser) with **Seibon** carbon fiber hood (vented, 30% weight reduction) and **Vorsteiner** carbon fiber side skirts for aggressive stance and aero efficiency

**Rotiform LAS-R** 20x10.5" front / 21x12.5" rear forged wheels (ET35 front, ET25 rear) wrapped in **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R** tires (275/30/20 front, 325/25/21 rear) with **H&R** 20mm front / 25mm rear spacers for flush fitment and optimized grip

**Litchfield** carbon fiber rear wing (dual-element, adjustable angle) with **AEM** LED sequential turn signals integrated into the **MG Cyberster** factory taillight housings, and a **Novitec** custom matte British Racing Green wrap with **3M Gloss Black** accents on the grille and badges
